violations.description: Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Store food service items away from unprotected drain lines under hand sink.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied in a way that prevents contamination to food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Glass cleaner spray bottle stored on cup cart. Store away from food single service items.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Cabinet door at 3 compartment sink has water damage/swelling.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Debris build-up under coolers and ice machine. Needs cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor no longer sealed in high water areas. No longer smooth and easily cleanable.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
